_publications._publicationTitle: Pathogenic neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1) RNA splicing resolved by targeted RNAseq.

_contextSnippet: (Likely) pathogenic NF1 splicing events could be detected in five out of these 11 patients using RNAseq (45%)
details: Detected pathogenic splicing events in 5 out of 11 undiagnosed patients (45% detection rate), including 2 deep intronic variants
